Moonlit open ocean with distant tall ship under full sail, silver light dancing on black swells, stars blazing above
Storm-battered headland with ancient lighthouse beam cutting through rain, jagged rocks glistening beneath crashing waves and dark clouds
Ancient Mediterranean cove at twilight, crumbling stone steps descending into still turquoise water, olive trees on weathered cliffs
Northern sea at dusk, massive icebergs drifting past, green aurora shimmering across dark water and endless horizon
Abandoned colonial harbor at dawn, rotting wooden wharves collapsing into murky water, kelp-draped pilings covered in barnacles
Open ocean at golden hour, endless rolling swells catching amber light, lone three-masted galleon silhouetted on distant horizon
Sea cave interior, dark water lapping at moss-covered rock walls, dim blue light filtering from entrance
Rocky channel between fog-shrouded islands, dangerous currents swirling around weathered sea stacks, no visibility beyond
Shipwreck half-sunk on coral reef, broken mast and torn canvas rigging, white waves crashing over splintered hull
Windswept beach after hurricane, splintered timber and frayed rope scattered on sand, stars breaking through departing clouds
Steep fjord walls rising from black water, waterfall mist catching sunset light, tiny wooden rowboat far below
Old stone pier crumbling into midnight sea, rusted iron lantern casting weak light on wet stone, waves eroding foundation
Volcanic coast at sunset, black lava rock meeting turquoise surf, steam rising from tidal pools and crevices
Moonless night on calm ocean, bioluminescent plankton glowing beneath surface, merchant ship's lanterns reflecting in dark water
Tropical lagoon at midday, crystal water over white sand, wooden sailing canoe beached beneath palm trees
Rocky inlet during squall, rain hammering gray water, fishing boat seeking shelter near cliff face draped with vines
Ancient harbor ruins at twilight, toppled stone columns half-submerged, small wooden skiff tied to weathered marble
Open sea at noon, glassy water under blazing sun, Portuguese caravel becalmed with sails hanging limp
Misty estuary at dawn, wooden fishing weirs emerging from shallow water, reeds and marsh grass on muddy banks
Cliff-face grotto accessible only at low tide, pool of seawater inside, shells and driftwood on rocky floor
Storm approaching at dusk, purple-black clouds over whitecapped swells, schooner racing before wind with reefed sails
Coral atoll lagoon at sunrise, shallow water over reef, wrecked Spanish galleon listing on shoal
Winter coast under full moon, ice forming on rocks, snow on beach, fishing boat pulled above tideline
Mangrove channel at twilight, narrow waterway through twisted roots, wooden dugout canoe gliding through still brackish water
